patches.hypothesis: The refined patch addresses the overfitting by using a more robust algorithm that handles general cases and avoids hardcoding values. It also includes proper edge case handling and null checks.
patches.changes: The refined patch adds a more robust algorithm that handles general cases and avoids hardcoding values. It also includes proper edge case handling and null checks.
patches.diff: The refined patch adds a more robust algorithm that handles general cases and avoids hardcoding values. It also includes proper edge case handling and null checks.

patches.hypothesis: The createCopy method assumes that the start index is less than or equal to the end index, but the clone method passes start index 0 and end index -1 when there are no items in the series, which results in the error.
patches.original_code:
/** * Returns a clone of the time series. *

* Notes: *

    *
  • no need to clone the domain and range descriptions, since String * object is immutable;
    • *
  • we pass over to the more general method clone(start, end).
    • *
* * @return A clone of the time series. * * @throws CloneNotSupportedException not thrown by this class, but * subclasses may differ. */ public Object clone() throws CloneNotSupportedException { Object clone = createCopy(0, getItemCount() - 1); return clone; }

patches.hypothesis: The method was not handling the case when the time series is empty, causing the start index to be greater than the end index.
patches.original_code:
